svg.title: Mackes Desktop Environment
svg.desc: UX-17 v2.2 initial cut: source geometry preserved from map-icon.svg (MAP2-audio); palette swapped to MDE charcoal background + indigo accent per Q2/Q3. Distinct from monogram.svg in that this carries the brand palette baked-in (no currentColor) — this is the shipped app icon, not a tintable mark.
